usage: report_power [-help] [-block <string>] [-cap] [-cap_unit {F mF uf nF pF fF}] [-cell <string>] [-cell_list_file <string>] [-cell_type <string>] [-clock_domain <string>] [-clock_gating_efficiency] [-clock_network <string>] [-cluster_gating_efficiency] [-comb_seq_power] [-compress <integer>] [-count_seq_elements_in_clock_network] [-die_instance_name <string>] [-distribute] [-exclude_cells <string>] [-exclude_cells_file <string>] [-exclude_instances <string>] [-exclude_instances_file <string>] [-float_precision <float>] [-format <string>] [-group_type <string>] [-hierarchical_instances <string>] [-hierarchy <string>] [-include_group_instance_count] [-inst_list_file <string>] [-instances <string>] [-leakage] [-net] [-no_wrap] [-nworst <string>] [-o <string>] [-outfile <string>] [-output <string>] [-pg_net <string>] [-pg_pin] [-power_db_directory <string>] [-power_density_tiles <string>] [-power_density_tiles_row_col <string>] [-power_density_tiles_size <string>] [-power_domain <string>] [-power_unit <string>] [-print_memory_power] [-register_gating_efficiency] [-report_prefix <string>] [-sort <string>] [-stat] [-thermal_conductivity_inputs <string>] [-thermal_leakage_temp <string>] [-thermal_leakage_temperature_scale_table <string>] [-thermal_leakage_temperature_scale_table_file <string>] [-thermal_material_file <string>] [-thermal_power_map_SI_unit <string>] [-thermal_power_map_bottom_layer <string>] [-thermal_power_map_densitytable_tile <string>] [-thermal_power_map_file <string>] [-thermal_power_map_format <string>] [-thermal_power_map_format_version <string>] [-thermal_power_map_header_include_file <string>] [-thermal_power_map_powertable_tile <string>] [-thermal_power_map_tile <string>] [-thermal_power_map_top_layer <string>] [-threshold <string>] [-threshold_voltage_group <string>] [-time_based_report] [-time_unit <string>] [-toggle_rate] [-use_geometry_cell_size <string>] [-view <string>]

options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -block
options.description: create power reports for block <block_name>

options.name: -cap
options.description: report net cap and pin cap

options.name: -cap_unit
options.description: capacitance unit. Default : pF (picoFarads)

options.name: -cell
options.description: cells to report

options.name: -cell_list_file
options.description: cell list in file to report

options.name: -cell_type
options.description: Specifies the cell type to include in the power report. Default : all

options.name: -clock_domain
options.description: Specify clock domains in power reports.

options.name: -clock_gating_efficiency
options.description: Generates a report that includes the Clock Gating Efficiency (CGE) for all clock gating instances as well as different hierarchies in the design.

options.name: -clock_network
options.description: Reports the power consumption of the clock network, including the power for generated clocks. Default : all.

options.name: -cluster_gating_efficiency
options.description: Specifies to generate the cluster efficiency report in the RGE report.

options.name: -comb_seq_power
options.description: Specifies to generate a report that gives the ratio of combinational versus sequential power for all modules of a given hierarchy.

options.name: -compress
options.description: compressed power report generation

options.name: -count_seq_elements_in_clock_network
options.description: include seqnential elements in clock power

options.name: -die_instance_name
options.description: specify die name

options.name: -distribute
options.description: create distributed power analysis setup

options.name: -exclude_cells
options.description: -exclude_cells <cell_list>

options.name: -exclude_cells_file
options.description: -exclude_cells_file <cell_list_file>

options.name: -exclude_instances
options.description: -exclude_instances <inst_list>

options.name: -exclude_instances_file
options.description: -exclude_instances_file <instance_list_file>

options.name: -float_precision
options.description: floating number precision control

options.name: -format
options.description: Specifies the type of report summary required for static power reporting. Valid Values are {simple | detailed},

options.name: -group_type
options.description: user-defined cell group based power summary

options.name: -hierarchical_instances
options.description: Specifies to report all the power content for the specified hierarchical instances/ blocks.

options.name: -hierarchy
options.description: Specifies the hierarchy level that is included in the power report.

options.name: -include_group_instance_count
options.description: Report instance count for each category in group power section

options.name: -inst_list_file
options.description: instance list in file to report

options.name: -instances
options.description: Specifies the instances to include in the power report.

options.name: -leakage
options.description: Reports only leakage power of the design.

options.name: -net
options.description: Reports the net switching power, as well as the load capacitance, toggle rate, and switching values for each net in the design.

options.name: -no_wrap
options.description: no wrapping for long lines

options.name: -nworst
options.description: Reports the number of nets with the highest net switching power.

options.name: -o
options.description: Specifies the name of the power analysis output directory that saves the power reports.

options.name: -outfile
options.description: Specifies the name of the report file in which the top-level summary of the power consumption information is written.

options.name: -output
options.description: Output Directory

options.name: -pg_net
options.description: Reports the power consumed by each instance that is connected to the specified list of power nets. Default : all.

options.name: -pg_pin
options.description: include supply pin name in power report

options.name: -power_db_directory
options.description: power DB directory path

options.name: -power_density_tiles
options.description: number of power density tiles

options.name: -power_density_tiles_row_col
options.description: number of tiles in X/Y dimensions to partition the specified region

options.name: -power_density_tiles_size
options.description: tile size for partitioning the specified region

options.name: -power_domain
options.description: power domain list to report

options.name: -power_unit
options.description: power number unit

options.name: -print_memory_power
options.description: print memory power as seperate category

options.name: -register_gating_efficiency
options.description: Generates a report that includes the Register Gating Efficiency (RGE) and Data Aware Gating Efficiency (DAGE) for all sequential cell instances as well as different hierarchies in the design.

options.name: -report_prefix
options.description: Specifies a prefix for the report in which the top-level summary of the power consumption information is written.

options.name: -sort
options.description: Sorts the instance-based power consumption data by internal , switching , leakage , or total power. Default : total

options.name: -stat
options.description: report net statistics

options.name: -thermal_conductivity_inputs
options.description: Specifies a file containing the thermal conductivity value for layers.

options.name: -thermal_leakage_temp
options.description: Defines the temperature to calculate leakage for the power map file.

options.name: -thermal_leakage_temperature_scale_table
options.description: <string> Defines global leakage power scaling factors on each temperature point.

options.name: -thermal_leakage_temperature_scale_table_file
options.description: <string> Defines library/cell/instance based leakage power scaling factors on each temperature point.

options.name: -thermal_material_file
options.description: Specifies a file to allow layer thickness set by user.

options.name: -thermal_power_map_SI_unit
options.description: use SI unit for Thermal Conductivity

options.name: -thermal_power_map_bottom_layer
options.description: <string> report zero metal density lower than this layer

options.name: -thermal_power_map_densitytable_tile
options.description: <string> Defines metal density table tile number in the X and Y direction. By default 10*10 will be used.

options.name: -thermal_power_map_file
options.description: Generates the power map file with the specified name in the output directory.

options.name: -thermal_power_map_format
options.description: Generates a tile-based power map file in the simple or stack format to perform accurate thermal analysis.

options.name: -thermal_power_map_format_version
options.description: <string> Version tag in power map file for different format.

options.name: -thermal_power_map_header_include_file
options.description: <string> Specifies a file for adding extra line in power map file header.

options.name: -thermal_power_map_powertable_tile
options.description: <string> Defines power table tile number in the X and Y direction. By default 10*10 will be used.

options.name: -thermal_power_map_tile
options.description: Defines the tile number in the X and Y direction. By default 10*10 will be used.

options.name: -thermal_power_map_top_layer
options.description: report zero metal density higher than this layer

options.name: -threshold
options.description: Filters out the instances whose total power dissipation is less than the specified value. Default : 0.

options.name: -threshold_voltage_group
options.description: Reports leakage by voltage threshold group in the power report. Default : all.

options.name: -time_based_report
options.description: write out detailed VCD profiling report

options.name: -time_unit
options.description: time unit

options.name: -toggle_rate
options.description: Specifies to dump out instance-based activity to the outfile. If multiple clocks are reaching the instance, then the fastest clock is used as a reference.

options.name: -use_geometry_cell_size
options.description: specify using gepmoetry or placement for sclp PGV cell size

options.name: -view
options.description: Power analysis is performed for the specified view. Default : Uses current view in Tempus.
